Fix: apply given patch and bump version for libpurple because it uses silc-toolkit:

/usr/ports/net-im/libpurple/Makefile
LIB_DEPENDS+=		silcclient-1.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/silc-toolkit


Patch attached with submission follows:
